queue_item.action: Preserve the distinction between stable project identity and evolving descriptive frames.

progress.memory_recovered: Mirror Cartographer is the stable project identity; website, interface, context engine, continuity architecture, knowledge substrate, operating system, and similar terms are descriptions or frames, not former names.
progress.contradiction_resolved: Supersedes the unsupported narrative that descriptive evolution constituted project renaming.
progress.verification: Both artifacts were accepted additively by the GitHub contents API on main; no shared team-owned file was overwritten.

queue_item.handoff: Create M-003 to build a dated, privacy-safe description lexicon with separate fields for identity, description, implementation, metaphor, source class, and confidence.

non_overwrite_note: This append-only queue update records continuity_mining-owned progress without replacing operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json or any peer-owned state.
